# Copilot Instructions — Sakir Saiyed Portfolio

This is a React 18 + Vite 6 portfolio website using vanilla CSS (no Tailwind).

## Rules

- All content is defined in `src/data/siteData.js` — never hardcode text in components
- Use CSS custom properties from `src/styles/tokens.css` for colors/fonts
- Use path aliases: `@components`, `@sections`, `@hooks`, `@data`, `@styles`
- Each section component has a co-located `.css` file
- Use `useScrollReveal` hook for scroll animations
- Use `useTheme` hook for dark/light mode
- Icons: Lucide React for UI icons, `@components/Icons` for brand SVGs
- Functional components with default exports only
- Prettier: no semicolons, single quotes, trailing commas
